name: daily-fresh fetch: when auto-refresh fetch fails, source is marked stale-warn-degraded; subsequent rule activation prints warning but does not block (non-strict)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id x --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/fail.sh" --emit-status "$PWD/status.json" 2>/dev/null && grep "stale-warn-degraded" status.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
